oracle_text:
Flying

At the beginning of combat on each turn, choose up to two target Squirrels you control. They gain flying until end of turn.

Whenever one or more Squirrels you control with flying deal combat damage to a player, create a Food token. This ability triggers only once each turn.
flavor_text: The safest burrow is sometimes the one between branches.
